problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
hypothesis: Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature may resolve Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear by activating at the systems level.
